title: 2026 Oscars Winners: Full Coverage
text: Warner Bros.' One Battle After Another claimed Best Picture at the 98th Academy Awards ceremony held Sunday at the Dolby Theater in Hollywood. The film dominated with six total wins, while Sinners followed with four victories. Sean Penn won Best Supporting Actor for his role in One Battle After Another. According to the article, this marks his third career Oscar but first in the category, though Penn was notably absent from the ceremony to accept his prize. He had previously won this award category at the Actor Awards earlier in March. Michael B. Jordan earned Best Actor for his dual role in Sinners, marking his first career Oscar nomination. Jessie Buckley claimed Best Actress for Hamnet, becoming the first Irish woman to win in that category on her first nomination. Warner Bros. led all studios with eleven statuettes total. Netflix secured seven wins, including three for Frankenstein. The inaugural Best Casting Oscar went to One Battle After Another. Paul Thomas Anderson won both Best Director and Best Adapted Screenplay for One Battle After Another, becoming only the ninth person to achieve this feat in a single night.
